projects.title: Xiaozhi AI on ESP32 DevKit V1
projects.description: Run a real-time AI voice assistant on the ESP32 DevKit V1 using Xiaozhi firmware. Includes INMP441 microphone, MAX98357A I2S amplifier, full wiring guide and firmware.

about.description: Step-by-step hardware and firmware projects for makers. From AI assistants on microcontrollers to custom robotics — every build documented and open source.
